Welcome to Atlantis Bounce – a deep sea puzzle adventure!
Shoot pearls and clear blocks in this addictively simple arcade puzzle game. The deeper you go, the more pearls you collect and the tougher the challenges become.

Build your pearl army:
Collect extra pearls to increase your shot count.
Fire dozens of pearls in a single turn for maximum impact.
Keep the blocks from reaching the bottom!

Power-ups to boost your play:
Use vertical and horizontal blasts to wipe out rows and columns.
Strategically activate power-ups to survive close calls.

A relaxing underwater theme:
Immerse yourself in soothing ocean visuals.
No timers, no pressure—just satisfying, skillful play.
Whether you're chasing a high score or unwinding after a long day, Pearls of Atlantis is your perfect pocket escape. Just one more shot… 

Download now and begin your journey into the deep!

BALL x PIT is a brick-breaking, ball-fusing, base-building survival roguelite. Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.

BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Develop arcane ammunition and resources in pursuit of treasure, recruiting additional heroes to aid you in your perilous quest.

Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The pit plays host to armies of barbaric creatures, hellbent on ending your quest before it even begins. Armed with a growing arsenal of magic-infused projectiles, batter your way through multiple levels of increasingly challenging obstacles to claim the ultimate prizes and rebuild New Ballbylon.

Fuse Your Balls
The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Build New Ballbylon
Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

Recruit Fellow Hunters
As you explore the pit you’ll encounter fellow treasure hunters eager to add their skills to your expedition. Each character has unique, upgradable mechanics that totally change the way you play the game. Experimentation and adaptation are crucial to the success of New Ballbylon!

Brick Blast is an engaging bricks and balls game with simple rules, a hint of challenge, and plenty of effortless fun. Pick your angle, shoot the balls, and watch them blast through every brick in their path.

Brick Blast delivers pure enjoyment with no rush or pressure. Play at your own pace and enjoy smooth, dynamic gameplay that will help you unwind while training your logic and focus.

How to Play Brick Blast:

The goal is simple: break the bricks and keep the board clear. Swipe to aim and release to shoot—the ball shooter sends glowing balls flying across the screen, bouncing off walls and smashing through colorful blocks. Plan your shots wisely to hit the best angles, clear multiple bricks at once, and watch the balls bounce out across the board in dazzling chains of glowing hits before the blocks reach the bottom line.

Discover power blocks that make this block breaker even more exciting:

• Laser shoots across rows or columns, damaging all blocks along its path.
• Multiplier triples your balls for massive combos.
• Redirect changes the path to reach tricky angles.
• Extra Ball gives you more power until the end of the round.

Use power blocks skillfully to enjoy mighty ball blasts and brick-breaking chain reactions.

Why You’ll Love Brick Blast:

• An easy-to-play brick breaker game with a modern look and smooth graphics.
• Dynamic levels packed with special blocks, combos, ball blasts, and glowing brick breaker effects.
• A calming pastime—no pressure, no time limits, just pure focus and pleasure.
• A fun way to unwind while honing your strategy skills—perfect for players who love puzzle quests and brick-breaking games.
• Endless ball breaker gameplay that keeps you coming back for more.

Take a break, play Brick Blast, and feel the joy of every perfect shot!

تحكم كامل
- شاشة كاملة مع دوران تلقائي

خصوصية وأمان

متوافق مع جميع الأجهزة

- تصميم متجاوب يتكيف مع جميع الأحجام
- أداء عالي وسرعة فائقة

لماذا Buz One؟

سهل الاستخدام - واجهة بسيطة وواضحة
قوي - يدعم جميع صيغ الفيديو الشائعة
سريع - تحميل وتشغيل فوري

Sixty-five million years ago, a meteor impact wiped out the dinosaurs. To save them from extinction, you and your teammates received orders to go back in time to the Jurassic era and collect genetic samples. But something went wrong. Exiting the time machine, you see a landscape torn apart by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions, echoing with the deafening wails of dying dinosaurs: The meteor already hit.

To survive, you need Crystal Cores to activate a quantum field capable of blocking out the raining flames and keeping infected dinosaurs at bay.

As you explore the prehistoric earth, you realize that this extinction event wasn’t an accident: you’re not the only humans here…

Game Features
【Save the Dinosaurs】
Build and upgrade your own high-tech Base to protect against cataclysmic volcanic eruptions and save the dinosaurs from extinction. Also, manage the shelter’s food, wood, iron, and other resources to keep your dinosaurs alive.

【Power Up Dinosaurs】
Tame T. Rexes, Velociraptors, Triceratops, and other dinosaurs who will help you produce supplies, transport food, and improve your Base. Choose your strongest dinosaurs to lead a powerful army against your enemies!

【Search for Supplies】
After the impact, resources are in high demand. Strengthen your dinosaurs to compete for supplies so that you can expand your Base, unite the continent, and discover the truth behind the dinosaurs’ extinction. Then you’ll finally be able to return home with the dinosaur gene samples.

【Clans and Competition】
You’ll need to ally with other players and form a powerful clan if you hope to take on hostile forces and survive the cataclysm. Only then will you be able to protect your new home.

Saving the dinosaurs and reaching the Jurassic era won’t be easy! Will you be the one to save this world? Download now to begin your breathtaking adventure through the world of dinosaurs!

Enjoy a truly relaxing, NO-TIMER puzzle experience with absolutely NO PAY-TO-WIN. Drop Escape: Block Puzzle lets you think, plan, and solve at your own pace. No countdowns, no pressure, no forced purchases-just pure, satisfying color-matching gameplay.

If you love color sort puzzles, gravity puzzles, marble drop games, block puzzles, or brain-training logic challenges, this fresh drop-and-match mechanic will feel instantly addictive.

Move colorful holes around the board, match them with marbles of the same color, and drop each marble into place. Clear all holes, solve the puzzle, and progress through hundreds of handcrafted, smartly designed levels. Easy to understand, deeply satisfying to master, and perfect for players who enjoy calm, clever puzzles without stress.

How to Play:
- Drag holes anywhere on the board
- Match hole colors with marbles of the same color
- Move a hole under a marble to drop it instantly
- Clear holes by collecting all matching marbles
- Finish each level by removing every hole
- Use boosters for tricky situations
Simple to learn. Surprisingly strategic. Always relaxing.

Game Features:
- Unique Drop-and-Match Gameplay
A new puzzle mechanic where YOU move the holes. Drop marbles, match colors, and solve smart puzzles using clever planning.

- Brain-Training Logic Challenges
From beginner-friendly puzzles to multi-step logic challenges that reward strategy and smart thinking.

- NO TIMER - Play at Your Own Pace
Think, plan, and solve without rush. No countdowns. No turn limits. No stress. Enjoy pure, relaxing puzzle flow.

- NO PAY-TO-WIN - Fair & Fun
No forced boosts, no pressure to buy power-ups, no skill walls. Every level is designed to be solved with logic, not spending.

- Beautiful, Clean Visuals
Smooth animations and vibrant colored marbles make every move satisfying and easy on the eyes.

- Special Hole Types for Extra Challenge
Ice Holes, Mystery Holes, Crates and more keep gameplay fresh and varied through hundreds of handcrafted levels.

- Helpful Power-Ups
Use the Claw to transport a marble instantly, the Magnet to pull marbles together, or the Shrinker to shrink holes for tight spaces. Fully optional, never required.

- Offline Play Supported
Enjoy your favorite color-matching puzzle anywhere-no Wi-Fi needed.

Relaxing. Clever. Fair. Always Fun.

App Name: 好用智能导航 - 北斗卫星精准语音导航
Description:
好用智能导航，是一款以精准、省心、安全为核心的智能导航工具，覆盖城市通勤、自驾出游、周边生活、附近钓点汇总等场景，凭借极简操作直击 “找路难、找资源烦、遇麻烦慌” 的出行痛点，让每一次出行都告别折腾，得心应手。

【路线规划+语音导航】
还在为通勤绕路、自驾陌生路段分心看手机发愁？这款导航直接帮你解决出行烦恼！依托实时交通大数据与高精度定位，系统会智能生成最优、常规等多条路线任你选，早高峰避开拥堵、长途预判车流，搭配全程拟人化语音指引，精准播报转向、车道、限速等突发路况秒级预警，新手也能从容应对每一次出行。

【卫星地图・山脉湖泊全景浏览】
帮你解锁自然地貌浏览新体验！依托高清卫星影像与高精度地形建模技术，系统会清晰呈现山脉脉络、湖泊轮廓，支持全景俯瞰、局部放大等多种浏览模式搭配地貌细节可视化展示，植被覆盖、水域边界一目了然，无论是户外爱好者还是自然探索者，都能直观领略每一处山川湖海的壮阔。

【多种地图灵活切换】

【多维度出行方案】
综合交通选择：支持驾车、公交、步行、骑行、地铁等多元路线，适配各类出行场景。

【刚需服务秒速查】
出门找补给不用再翻来翻去！直接点「加油站 / 充电站 / 停车场」按钮，附近的设施立刻筛选出来，加油、充电、停车再也不绕路！
